name: Stock Graph
description: A quote in big bold type over its own price chart (Matrix panel)

settings.label: Symbols
settings.note: One or more tickers or indices — ^DJI (Dow), ^GSPC (S&P 500), ^IXIC (Nasdaq), AAPL. Several rotate like a market board. Blank = Dow.

settings.label: Seconds Per Symbol
settings.note: How long each symbol shows before the board rotates to the next (with two or more).

settings.label: Label (override)
settings.note: Only used with a single symbol; blank uses the symbol or index name.

settings.label: Pause When Markets Closed
settings.note: Skip price updates overnight and on weekends, when the exchange is shut.
